headline: T-Mobile stands to gain as another key rival retreats from retail
summary: In any competitive market, there comes a time when the field thins out. When that happens, of course, the strongest players quietly start doing the math. That moment is slowly arriving for T-Mobile US Inc. (TMUS). In the span of a few weeks, two of its rivals have made moves that could reshape the ...
